title: Blastromech droid
content:
{{Top|canon=BT-1 assassin droid}}
[[File:Blastromech.jpg|220px|thumb|A blastromech droid]]
A '''blastromech droid''' was a [[Astromech droid/Legends|astromech droid]] that had been modified to serve as a [[Security droid/Legends|security droid]]. Blastromech droids were used during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] and the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Description==
Compared to standard astromech droids, these droids had an addition of two or more [[Blaster/Legends|blasters]] on top of their bodies.<ref name="SWG">{{GalaxiesAED}}</ref>

==History==
During the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatists]] used blastromech droids to defend their [[Neimoidian droid factory|droid factory]] on [[Mustafar/Legends|Mustafar]].<ref name="SWG:WPWT">{{SWGcite|exp=ToOW|type=general|Wrong Place, Wrong Time|Mustafar}}</ref>

After the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], blastromech droids could be found in use by the [[Death Watch/Legends|Death Watch]] at [[Death Watch bunker|their bunker]] on the [[Endor/Legends|forest moon of Endor]].<ref name="SWG:DWB">{{SWGcite|exp=AED|type=poi|Death Watch Bunker|Endor}}</ref>

[[Borvo]] the Hutt owned several blastromechs to defend his [[Borvo's Vault|vault]] on [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]],<ref name="SWG:ORDMBBD">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=class|Legacy|Old Republic Droid Modules: Borvo's Battle Droid|Naboo}}</ref> as well as the [[Ultragungans]] in their [[Ultragungan Lair|bunker]].<ref name="SWG:ORDMTGBD">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=class|Legacy|Old Republic Droid Modules: The Gungan Battle Droid|Naboo}}</ref>

Blastromech droids were also used by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] in a [[Prison/Legends|prison]] facility within the [[Hidden Rebel Base|hidden Rebel base]] on [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]].<ref name="SWG:RtfIO">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=faction|Imperial|Rescue the first Imperial Officer|Corellia}}</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
Blastromech droids appeared in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG" /> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref> Blastromech droids were added to the game with an [[W:c:swg:Update Notes: 25 May 04|update]] released on [[May 25]], [[2004]].<ref name="SonyCite-Publish 8: Droids Rebuilt">{{SonyCite|url=recent_updates.jsp?o=61943|text=Publish 8: Droids Rebuilt}}</ref>
